# Skill: Flower Shop AI Chatbot

## Description
Adds the Flower Shop `/api/chat` chatbot endpoint, query classifier, and protected image upload route. The skill includes RAG/text2sql routing and a simple customer chat frontend.

## Trigger
Use when asked to implement or extend the Flower Shop AI chatbot, product Q&A, or protected customer upload flow.

## Constraints
- NEVER modify existing auth route signatures.
- Do not change the database schema format once created.
- Keep the frontend minimal and self-contained.
- Preserve any existing tests unless extending them with new coverage.
